_comment: Placeholder hex values — REPLACE these by sampling from Tyler's source files when they arrive. Best-guess approximations from the brand spec only.

mint.name: Mint
mint.usage: Primary teal/mint. Heavy hitter, use frequently. Body accents, buttons, links, callouts.

flash.name: Flash
flash.usage: Second primary. Heavy hitter, use frequently. CTAs, hot moments, drop announcements.

cash.name: Cash
cash.usage: Green, used SPARINGLY. Primarily as halftone gradient. Special moments only.

black.name: Background Black
black.usage: Primary background everywhere. Per Tyler's social JPG exports.
